name: swarmauri-sdk-authoring
description: Codex skills for adding and changing Swarmauri SDK interfaces, base classes, mixins, concretes, standalone packages, and plugin packages.

interface.shortDescription: Author Swarmauri SDK additions with repo-native rules.
interface.longDescription: Provides focused Codex skills for adding Swarmauri core interfaces, base classes, mixins, swarmauri_standard concretes, standards packages, community packages, experimental packages, and plugin packages. The skills enforce interface registry updates, citizenship registry updates, entry points, inheritance patterns, README branding, and package validation.
defaultPrompt: Use $swarmauri-add-core-interface to add a new SDK interface.
Use $swarmauri-add-standards-standalone to add a first-class package.
Use $swarmauri-add-plugin-package to add a plugin package.
